title: Safonne Pendon

{{Quote|The attacks made by Pendon and his pirates have managed to stop resupply efforts to several bases in the Borderland Regions. It was hoped that by use of heavily armed convoys the pirates could be stopped, but these efforts have failed.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Safonne Pendon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] leader. Pendon commanded a modest, though effective, fleet of ships from his [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Safonne's Sword]]''. He targeted [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] convoys, forcing the crews to surrender, while taking possession of both the ships and their cargoes.

==Biography==
Safonne Pendon was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. Pendon operated as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], leading a fleet from his [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Safonne's Sword]]''. His forces included the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Venithon Twins]], several heavily-modified [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]], two [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]], and a [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]. Pendon's base of operations were located in the [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]], on the icy planet of [[Seltaya Major]]. He discovered the world after a failed raid against an Imperial [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate]]. During the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Pendon sold the merchandise he plundered to other criminal elements, and on occasion, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="WBC" />

Pendon's organization was big enough to rival with the [[Hy'thor Group|Hy'thor pirate group]]. Due to this, on [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Hy'thor leader [[Ompiach]] sent some of his pirates (including the [[Venithon Twins]]) to negotiate a treaty with Pendon. Unfortunately, the meeting became a naval battle.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

During the battle, the crossfire damaged a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with a valuable cargo. The freighter crash-landed in a nearby [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the Hy'thor pirates followed it to plunder the cargo. It was unclear if Pendon felt any need to do so.<ref name="air" />

With the rise of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Pendon no longer dealt with the former Alliance, and instead began dealing with the Empire, as well as his usual clientele in the criminal underworld. Starting in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Pendon began targeting [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]], and each time overwhelming pirate forces forced the surrender of New Republic ships. The New Republic posted a reward of 12,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for Pendon's capture on the charges of piracy, theft, and sabotage.<ref name="WBC" />

==Personality and traits==
Safonne Pendon was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was 1.75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He was an adept commander and intimidating individual, as well as a shrewd bargainer and con man.<ref name="WBC" />

==Skills and abilities==
Pendon was trained in the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[blaster artillery]], [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]], and [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee combat]]. He also had survival training. Pendon was knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], cultures, languages, and [[Star system/Legends|planetary systems]], and had an understanding of [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] procedure and the criminal underworld. A capable [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], Pendon could fly [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], small [[Transport/Legends|transports]], and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], as well as [[Astrogation/Legends|plot courses]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. He was also able to use the weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems on small vessels, and operate [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles. Pendon could program and repair [[Computer/Legends|computers]] and [[Droid/Legends|droids]], perform demolitions, and bypass security systems.<ref name="WBC" />

==Equipment==
Pendon wielded a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pendon was first profiled in [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]]. [[Rob Caswell]] provided the illustration for Pendon.

His surname was sometimes misspelled "Pendonn" in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''.
